Post excerpts and leading paragraphs

17/03/2017 ▪ #dactl #howto

By default, dactl’s blog layout displays post excerpts which are leading paragraphs as well. This requires some manual work on your part when writing a post but don’t worry - it’s really easy. Read on for more info.

Post excerpts

First, let’s see how this and the above paragraph looks like in markdown:

Read more

Footnotes

16/03/2017 ▪ #dactl #howto

dactl uses Barefoot plugin to create nice looking inline footnotes from those generated by kramdown, daktl’s markdown processor. Read on for more information about how to add footnotes to your posts and how to enable/disable Barefoot plugin.

What is Barefoot.js

I really like the look of inline-footnotes created by Bigfoot.js but it requires jQuery and loading whole library just to have footnotes seems excessive.
